## Checklist

- [ ] `code-reviewer` — no critical issues (score < 91)
- [ ] `silent-failure-hunter` — no CRITICAL/HIGH findings
- [ ] `pr-test-analyzer` — no gaps rated 9-10 remaining
- [ ] `type-design-analyzer` — all dimensions >= 5 (if types changed)
- [ ] `comment-analyzer` — no critical comment issues remaining
- [ ] `code-simplifier` — applied after review passed
- [ ] CI passes (`npm run lint`, `npm run test`, `npm run build`)
- [ ] No console errors or unexpected warnings
